figures.caption: Fig. 1. Per-seed balanced accuracy across all five foundation models (rows, grouped top-to-bottom from 157 M to 5 M parameters) and five adaptation methods (within-group rows; colored by method), split by training regime (left: probe; right: full SFT). Dot key: •BCI-IV-2a • PhysioNet-MI •TUEV • FACED •MDD (Mumtaz 2016) | per-dataset mean. Bold y-labels highlight the best adapter per backbone-regime pair; dashes denote inapplicable cells.
